mapper.insert: INSERT INTO table_orders ( table_id, order_number, order_type, delivery_method, delivery_address, customer_phone, order_time, status, items_total, delivery_fee, total_amount, is_checked_out, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, delivery_status, reorder_time, reservation_id ) VALUES ( #{tableId}, #{orderNumber}, #{orderType}, #{deliveryMethod}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{customerPhone}, NOW(), #{status}, #{itemsTotal}, #{deliveryFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{isCheckedOut}, #{isPrepaid}, #{prepaidAmount}, #{deliveryStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{reorderTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reservationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND status = 'ORDERED' LIMIT 1
SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND status = 'CHECKED_OUT' ORDER BY order_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT total_amount FROM table_orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'ORDERED'
SELECT order_time FROM table_orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'ORDERED'
SELECT o.order_time, o.total_amount, o.order_id FROM table_orders o WHERE o.table_id = #{tableId} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' ORDER BY o.order_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT mi.item_code, mi.name, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.price_at_order FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE table_orders SET status = 'CHECKED_OUT', is_checked_out = TRUE WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_checked_out = TRUE LIMIT 1 )

SELECT CASE WHEN active.order_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN unserved.unserved_count > 0 THEN 'ORDERED_UNFINISHED' ELSE 'ORDERED_FINISHED' END WHEN checked.order_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'CHECKED_OUT' ELSE 'NO_ORDER' END AS order_status FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND status = 'ORDERED' LIMIT 1 ) active ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS unserved_count FROM order_items oi JOIN table_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.table_id = #{tableId} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' AND oi.served_quantity < oi.quantity ) unserved ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND status = 'CHECKED_OUT' LIMIT 1 ) checked ON TRUE
SELECT DISTINCT CAST(year AS CHAR) AS year FROM item_quarterly_sales ORDER BY year DESC
SELECT mi.item_code, mi.name, oi.price_at_order, oi.quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE item_quarterly_sales SET quantity_sold = quantity_sold + #{quantity}, sale_timestamp = NOW() WHERE sales_id = #{salesId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_quarterly_sales ( item_code, item_name, sale_price, quantity_sold, sale_timestamp, year, quarter ) VALUES ( #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{salePrice}, #{quantity}, NOW(), #{year}, #{quarter} )
mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity,oi.prepared_quantity,oi.status, oi.price_at_order, oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.served_table_display_id, oi.quantity_distribution, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM table_orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id JOIN restaurant_tables t ON o.table_id = t.table_id WHERE t.display_id = #{displayId} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' ORDER BY oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.order_item_id ASC

SELECT o.order_id, t.display_id as table_display, t.status as table_status, CASE WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_id) = 0 THEN '未下单' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(oi.order_item_id) THEN '制作完成' ELSE '制作中' END as order_status, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(o.reorder_time, o.order_time), '%H:%i') as order_time FROM table_orders o LEFT JOIN restaurant_tables t ON o.table_id = t.table_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_type IN ('DINE_IN','RESERVATION') AND o.status = 'ORDERED' GROUP BY o.order_id, t.display_id, t.status, o.order_time, o.reorder_time ORDER BY COALESCE(o.reorder_time, o.order_time) ASC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_number, CASE WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_id) = 0 THEN '未下单' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(oi.order_item_id) THEN '制作完成' ELSE '制作中' END as order_status, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, '%H:%i') as order_time FROM table_orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_type = 'TAKEOUT' AND o.delivery_method = 'PICKUP' AND o.status = 'ORDERED' GROUP BY o.order_id, o.order_number, o.order_time ORDER BY o.order_time ASC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_number, o.delivery_status, CASE WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_id) = 0 THEN '未下单' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(oi.order_item_id) THEN '制作完成' ELSE '制作中' END as order_status, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, '%H:%i') as order_time FROM table_orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_type = 'TAKEOUT' AND o.delivery_method = 'DELIVERY' AND o.status = 'ORDERED' GROUP BY o.order_id, o.order_number, o.delivery_status, o.order_time ORDER BY o.order_time ASC

SELECT order_id, order_number, table_id, reservation_id, order_type, delivery_method, delivery_address, customer_phone, order_time, status, items_total, delivery_fee, total_amount, is_checked_out, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, delivery_status, reorder_time FROM table_orders WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND status = 'ORDERED'

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM table_orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.prepared_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.served_table_display_id, oi.quantity_distribution, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC

SELECT order_id, order_number, table_id, reservation_id, order_type, delivery_method, delivery_address, customer_phone, order_time, status, items_total, delivery_fee, total_amount, is_checked_out, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, delivery_status, reorder_time FROM table_orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CHECKED_OUT' THEN 'CHECKED_OUT' WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_id) = 0 THEN 'NO_ORDER' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SERVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(oi.order_item_id) THEN 'ORDERED_FINISHED' ELSE 'ORDERED_UNFINISHED' END AS order_status FROM table_orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' GROUP BY o.order_id, o.status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_cancellations ( cancellation_type, order_id, order_number, item_code, cancelled_quantity, before_status, cancelled_amount, cancellation_reason, cancellation_time ) VALUES ( #{cancellationType}, #{orderId}, #{orderNumber}, #{itemCode}, #{cancelledQuantity}, #{beforeStatus}, #{cancelledAmount}, #{reason}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE table_orders SET status = #{status}, total_amount = #{amount}, items_total = #{amount}, delivery_fee = 0.0, reorder_time = #{newOrderTime} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT order_id, reservation_id, order_type, status, items_total, total_amount FROM table_orders WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND order_type = 'RESERVATION'
LIMIT 1

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.prepared_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.served_table_display_id, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM table_orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE o.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND o.status = 'ORDERED' ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC

SELECT order_id, reservation_id, order_type, status, items_total, total_amount FROM table_orders WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND order_type IN ('RESERVATION', 'DINE_IN')
AND status IN ('NO_ORDER', 'ORDERED') ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'NO_ORDER' THEN 1 -- 优先返回预点餐 WHEN 'ORDERED' THEN 2 END, order_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT order_id, order_number, table_id, reservation_id, order_type, delivery_method, delivery_address, customer_phone, order_time, status, items_total, delivery_fee, total_amount, is_checked_out, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, delivery_status, reorder_time FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND status = #{status} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE table_orders SET table_id = NULL WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND table_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE table_id = #{tableId} LIMIT 1

SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status IN ('NO_ORDER', 'ORDERED') ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'NO_ORDER' THEN 1 WHEN 'ORDERED' THEN 2 END, order_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT order_id FROM table_orders WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'CHECKED_OUT' LIMIT 1
